summary:
Global cancer case data from GLOBOCAN 2012 records locations affected, often segmented by demographics such as age and sex; thus, specific incidences are likely reported alongside other detailed patient attributes.
``` Summary
Global cancer registry data from GLOBOCAN 2012 measures tumor sites while also collecting extensive demographic detail, particularly focusing on age groups and genders to identify patterns and risk factors.
```
